description: Create a 3D model of a trapezoidal lead screw in FreeCAD. The screw consists of a cylinder with a 12 mm diameter and 50 mm length aligned with the Z-axis. It must feature a helical groove with a 3 mm pitch running the full length of the rod. The groove profile should be 1.5 mm deep (cut radially) and 1.5 mm wide, using a square, rectangular, or trapezoidal profile. Save the FreeCAD project as /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/lead_screw.FCStd and export the final part as a STEP file to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/lead_screw.step.
